# RingYouth — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A website intended to list or share phone numbers of children and teenagers aged 12-18. This type of service raises serious privacy and safety concerns regarding minors.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About RingYouth
A website intended to list or share phone numbers of children and teenagers aged 12-18. This type of service raises serious privacy and safety concerns regarding minors.

## Target Audience
ילדים ובני נוער בגילאי 12-18

## Industry
שירותי מידע / רשתות חברתיות לנוער
